name: The Booze, Bets and Sex That Built America
original_name: The Booze, Bets and Sex That Built America
overview: Divulges surprising origin stories of the American alcohol, gambling, sex, and tobacco industries and the ambitiously notorious entrepreneurs who built some of history's biggest fortunes on the nation's cravings.

trailers.title: The Booze, Bets And Sex That Built America | Three-Part Series Premieres June 12 at 8/7c | HISTORY
